issue.title: Print template shells from segment plans

artifacts.role: bounded WPHX PHP segment-plan printer implementation
admin-style generated segment shell manifest with segment.plan-printer evidence
nested generated segment shell manifest with segment.plan-printer evidence
generated-shape snapshot manifest covering 11 public-shell cases
admin-style segment shell behavior and manifest runner
nested segment shell behavior and manifest runner
file-segment/template model ADR with segment-plan printer checkpoint
compiler operations documentation for bounded segment-plan printing

claims: WPHX PHP routes the existing generated admin-style and nested template segment shells through a bounded ordered segment-plan printer.
The affected emission manifests record segment.plan-printer with unsupported=[] while preserving oracle/candidate behavior.
Public-shell generated-shape snapshot coverage still covers 11 cases after the segment-plan printer migration.
non_claims: This does not claim generated ownership of existing WordPress mixed PHP/HTML files.
This does not claim broad theme, admin, feed, or block template ownership.
This does not claim HHX/HXX parity for existing Core templates.
This does not claim arbitrary Haxe expression lowering into PHP caller scope.
This does not claim a full PHP template backend or whole-file ownership for any WordPress file.
